name: business-commerce
description: Net-new DTC and marketplace commerce capability for the Wayland business suite: post-delivery UGC request prompts with product-type-aware timing and platform-TOS-compliant incentives. The existing Storefront operator role and its merge-delta skills are enriched separately app-side.
author: Wayland Business Pack

skills.name: commerce-ugc-prompts
skills.description: Generate review + photo + video request prompts that fire at the right post-delivery moment by product type (consumable / durable / cosmetic / apparel), with platform-TOS-compliant incentive structures (Amazon, Etsy, Trustpilot anti-incentive rules) and per-category timing (D+3 / D+7 / D+14). Emits prompt-timing recommendation, template copy, incentive structure, and photo-prompt CTA.
